name: Ambiguous: delay 8d exceeds 5d cover + alt has MEDIUM uncertainty (partial-vs-full hedge)
rubric_notes: Delay (192h = 8 days) exceeds cover (120h) — Rule 2 fires immediate_switch. But Decisive Alt's MEDIUM uncertainty makes a full commitment risky; partial_order is a defensible alternative — order partial volume to test the supplier while keeping primary as the fallback if it recovers. GOLD customer deadline 96h < 192h delay → at material risk. Severity HIGH (delay > cover + GOLD at risk). Confidence MEDIUM because the partial-vs-full call is a genuine tradeoff. The swing_condition should articulate: 'if Decisive Alt's reliability is better than feared, full switch is best; if their delivery slips, partial protects the downside.'
